subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast found guidance from the outpourings of thy Most Exalted Lord in the enkindled fire within the Divine Lote-Tree, may He strengthen thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من وجد الهدی من فیوضات ربه الاعلی علی النار الموقده فی سدره المنتهی ایدک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love and unity
